New Screenshot added and instruction updated

4.2	Protocol Informed Consent (Screening)Was the Household Contact eligible to participate in the full study? (Note: A full study HHC will participate in all required visits/assessment after screening ):
4.18	Sample Collection for Central Laboratory (Screening, Day 3, Day 5, Day 9 and Unscheduled visits)

Form Name updated and instruction updated
4.28	Blinded Baloxavir Marboxil Administration - 5-11 year olds (Screening)
4.29	Work Productivity and Activity Impairment Questionnaire plus Classroom Impairment Questions ( Day 9 Visit)
4.30	EQ-5D-5L to Measure Quality of Life (Screening, Day 3, Day 9 and Unscheduled visits)

Note: For IP Subjects, Age- 5-11 years  Subject Disposition eCRF is to be entered at the Subject level.   Subject Disposition Period Comp/Early Discontinuation for IP –     To be entered at the Subject level. The Date of Contact is to be entered at the Visit Date.  If any Adverse event was assessed or Conmed was provided to the Subject, please enter the details on respective eCRF.

Note 1: There should be no recording of the same data in multiple locations of the eCRF for any assessment in the study.  Example: If local labs are performed at Screening and are not required to be repeated for Day 1.  The Screening data should not be re-entered in the Day 1 visit folder. If they are performed only once then they must only be recorded once at whichever visit is appropriate and the eCRF on the other visit should be marked as ‘Not done’.
